# Kogvio

## Understand anything online without leaving the page.

Chrome Extensions

Every time I didn't understand something online, I had the same workflow: Copy. Open ChatGPT. Paste. Come back. It completely broke my focus. So I built Kogvio. Highlight anything on a webpage or PDF, ask questions instantly in context, and continue learning without leaving the page. Whether it's documentation, research papers, medical textbooks, or technical diagrams, Kogvio helps you understand—not just search.

 Overview
 Reviews
 Alternatives
 Built with
 Team
 More

Free Options [...] Hey Product Hunt! I'm Harshit, the solo founder behind Kogvio. The idea came from something I was doing dozens of times every day. I'd be reading documentation, research papers, medical textbooks, or technical articles, and every time I got stuck, my workflow looked like this: • Copy the text • Open ChatGPT • Paste it • Wait for an answer • Go back to where I was reading It completely broke my focus. So I started wondering... Why can't AI live where I'm already learning? That's why I built Kogvio. Now I can simply highlight anything on a webpage or PDF, ask questions instantly, generate mnemonics, simplify difficult concepts, or dive deeper without ever leaving the page. Over the past few months I've been refining Kogvio based on real usage, and today I'm excited to finally share it with [...] Free Options

results.title: Kogvio Competitors & Alternatives (2026)
results.content:
Subscribe

# KogvioAlternatives

Comparing Kogvio? These alternatives help you learn without tab-hopping. Try Monica, an on-page AI across sites; Heyday, which recalls notes and sources; MaxAI.me, a universal AI sidebar; or Wiseone for smarter reading and search. For documents, ChatPDF lets you query any PDF.
